title: 皐月賞の後に・桜したたか

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Coming in first is Sakura Chiyono O! Sakura
Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The resilient cherry blossom blooms, unharmed
even by the flames.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But for an instant, Yaeno's fighting spirit was as a
dance of flames, flaring up high enough to
incinerate the very sky.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The fact she has control over such intensity is
worthy of praise.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did iiit!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O, congrats! I knew you'd win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Everybody, thank you for cheering for me!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
You'll be at the Japanese Derby as well, right? I'm
looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gonna win the Derby too!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...AAAAARGH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm still such a novice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But only those who fight have the privilege of
lamenting defeat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I do not even have that right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, I will shine bright at the Japanese
Derby...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No matter how heavy the price I must pay.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My deepest apologies, Trainer.
choice_data_list: You have nothing to apologize for.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But... but!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm a disgrace!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to win... I wanted to claim victory for
Grampa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I vow to redouble my efforts to help her achieve
this goal.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes... Next time... Next time, I'll win for sure...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And prove that the path I've been following was
not a mistake.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, choosing to make use of my competitive
spirit was definitely the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As was learning to temper my fierce blaze with
the stillness of water.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall continue on the path that Grampa showed
me and prove that I've grown!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: This I shall do without fail at the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is willing to shed blood, sweat, and
tears for her ardent dream, and it is my role as her
trainer to help her fulfill it.
choice_data_list: Yeah! And I swear to guide you to victory!
Yeah! And I swear to guide you to victory!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! I'll do my very best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki makes her declaration loudly, with
tears glimmering in her eyes.
